latest.title: Docker Networking Explained: How Containers Actually Talk to Each Other
latest.description: Perfect Dockerfiles mean nothing if your containers can't communicate. Here's the mental model that finally made Docker networking click for me, built from a real multi-service AWS deployment.

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: Qleam AI - A Self-Learning Baby Cry Intelligence
latest.description:
Qleam AI is an AI-powered early childhood communication platform for smart parenting. It analyzes baby vocal signals into clear and structured insights. 
Its self-learning model learns from day-based data across babies of the same age, building a growing intelligence layer that reveals how communication patterns develop over time.

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: Anukriti – What If Drug Trials Included Everyone?
latest.description: Simulating drug safety across diverse genomes to detect population-specific risks before clinical trials begin.

latest.title: Building Secure Multi-Party Data Collaboration with AWS Clean Rooms
latest.description: Learn how to implement privacy-preserving analytics that enables organizations to collaborate on data insights without sharing raw data

latest.title: My manager asked if it could run itself. Here's how I automated iam-audit with Fargate, EventBridge and Terraform. Part 3
latest.description: From running a script manually every Monday to receiving it automatically at 9am — this post covers how I automated iam-audit using ECS Fargate, EventBridge Scheduler, and Terraform. No persistent infrastructure, no idle costs. Just an ephemeral task that spins up, audits 20+ AWS accounts, uploads the report to S3, sends a Slack notification with a presigned URL, and disappears. Includes design decisions, the partial backend pattern, and why secrets belong in Secrets Manager — not environment variables.

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: Aether Health
latest.description: Discover how our AI-powered platform reimagines the last mile of healthcare by focusing on empathetic symptom checking and prescription decoding. We provide verified, calming tools to combat health anxiety and prevent dangerous medication errors for vulnerable populations.

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: RecoverMate
latest.description: RecoverMate is an AI-powered "Recovery Concierge" that helps Australian disaster victims cut through the "second disaster" of overwhelming administrative bureaucracy. By leveraging AWS Generative AI to decode complex insurance policies and match users to eligible government grants and policies, we turn months of paperwork into a streamlined, actionable path to financial recovery.

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: Global Impact AI Navigator
latest.description: Global Impact AI Navigator (GIAN) is a multi-agent AI platform built on Amazon Bedrock that transforms a raw idea into a complete strategic package in under 60 seconds — SWOT diagnostic, live-grounded funding discovery, personalized roadmap, and a context-aware advisor. Designed for innovators in emerging markets, it democratizes access to the strategic guidance that usually requires expensive consultants or elite networks.

latest.title: Serverless RAG as a Service: A CDK Stack to Expose Your Bedrock Knowledge Base as an API and Connect It to Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Gateway
latest.description: Turn your Amazon Bedrock KB into a callable API and connect it to AgentCore GW as an MCP tool, all with AWS CDK. This post walks through a production-ready CDK stack deploying an API Gateway backed by Lambda, secured with SigV4, and designed to meet AC GW's requirements: explicit operationId fields, IAM outbound authorization, and an OpenAPI definition discoverable via GetExport. To expose your KB to apps or plug it into an AI agent, this pattern gives you a secure, repeatable, and extensible foundation.

latest.title: My First Cloud Architecture: Mastering IAM, Security, & EC2 Web Deployment
latest.description: This article walksthrough a hands-on AWS lab focused on moving beyond the basics to build a secure, hardened cloud environment. It details the setup of a 12-digit account structure, custom IAM policies to prevent accidental deletion, and the deployment of an Ubuntu-based Nginx web server. More than just a "how-to," it highlights the real-world troubleshooting needed to fix common Nginx and security group hurdles, proving the infrastructure is both functional and locked down.

trending.title: Construye con Strands Agents en Nerdearla Chile 2026
trending.description: Crea tu primer proyecto con Strands Agents en Nerdearla del 17 y 18 de Abril 2026 en Centro GAM, Santiago, Chile.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: VERA, A Multi-Agent Triage System for Healthcare in Chile
trending.description: A multi-agent healthcare triage system that screens patients in Chilean Spanish, detects crisis signals, and generates clinical reports. Built by two people on AWS for $17/month, designed to integrate with Chile's public health system via HL7 FHIR.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Ivy - The World's First Offline-Capable, Proactive AI Tutoring Agent
trending.description: A proactive AI tutoring agent powered by Amazon Bedrock that monitors student progress, initiates outbound voice calls, and runs on-device inference for offline learning addressing educational inequity for millions of Ethiopian students with intermittent connectivity.

trending.title: Introducing Article View Counts on AWS Builder Center
trending.description: You can now see how many builders are reading your articles, giving you a real metric to understand the reach of your content.

trending.title: Cómo crear un agente de IA desde cero. Open source, local y gratis.
trending.description: De un modelo que solo responde a uno que busca, razona y recuerda. Todo con código que puedes leer, forkear y contribuir.
